title: Mission Karmayogi – Sadhana Saptah (02–10 April, 2026)
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Mission Karmayogi – Sadhana Saptah (02–10 April, 2026)

Posted On:
10 APR 2026 5:32PM by PIB Delhi

The Legislative Department has observed
Mission Karmayogi – Sadhana Saptah
 from 2nd to 10th April, 2026, with the objective of promoting continuous learning and capacity building among its officers and staff.

During this period, extensive awareness initiatives have been undertaken across the Department to sensitise officers and officials about the importance of structured learning under Mission Karmayogi. All personnel have been encouraged to undertake a minimum of four hours of learning on the iGOT Karmayogi platform.

The officers and staff of the Department are actively participating in a wide range of curated online courses and learning modules, aimed at enhancing domain knowledge, professional competencies, and public service delivery capabilities with particular focus on Artificial Intelligence. Participants are also leveraging the platform to earn certifications and digital badges, reflecting their learning achievements.

The Sadhana Saptah has witnessed enthusiastic participation across all levels of the Department, reaffirming its commitment to fostering a culture of continuous learning and excellence in governance, in line with the guiding principle of
“Nagrik Devo Bhava.”

****

Samrat/PN

(Release ID: 2250860)

Visitor Counter : 100
